channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: OpenClaw developers targeted in GitHub phishing scam offering fake token airdrops
item.description: Security researchers said attackers are impersonating OpenClaw on GitHub, luring developers with bogus CLAW token giveaways that trick users into connecting their crypto wallets.

item.title: XRP signals 20% price rally amid record Korean exchange withdrawals
item.description: Korean traders are pulling XRP off exchanges at a rapid pace, while whale flows signal accumulation seen ahead of past rallies.

item.title: FTX Recovery Trust to distribute $2.2B to creditors in March
item.description: The fourth round of reimbursements to creditors and former clients of the failed crypto exchange since February 2025 brings the total paid to about $10 billion.

item.title: Bitcoin prediction markets see 70% chance BTC price crashes to $55K in 2026
item.description: Bitcoin bull market optimism has suffered since the October crash, as chances of an extended BTC price drop below $55,000 increase.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Bitcoin’s price discovery
item.description: Bitcoin’s price discovery is increasingly driven by derivatives positioning and institutional synthetics rather than spot demand, signaling a structural shift in how crypto markets move.

item.title: ECB seeks experts to help integrate digital euro into ATMs, card payment terminals
item.description: The European Central Bank is preparing the ground should legislators enable the issuance of a digital currency and the bank's governing council approve issuing it.

item.title: Bitcoin $20,000 put option is third most popular strike ahead of quarterly expiry
item.description: Nearly $600M in deep out-of-the-money puts highlights tail-risk positioning, though flows point more to volatility strategies than to outright bearish bets.

item.title: Major League Baseball signs prediction markets pacts with CFTC, Polymarket
item.description: The arrangement between the U.S. derivatives regulator and the professional sports organization is the first of its kind in overseeing sports events contracts.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Coinbase Commerce page requests seed phrases, raising security concerns
item.description: A Coinbase subdomain linked to its Commerce tool reportedly directed users to a withdrawal page asking to enter their seed phrases, raising concerns among security observers.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) drops 3.3%, leading index lower
item.description: Hedera (HBAR), down 2.9% from Wednesday, was also an underperformer.

item.title: OP_NET launches Bitcoin DeFi push without bridges or wrapped BTC
item.description: OP_NET has launched a “SlowFi” DeFi stack that runs smart contracts directly in standard Bitcoin transactions with BTC as the only gas asset, avoiding bridges and wrapped BTC.

item.title: Hacked crypto tokens drop 61% on average and rarely recover, Immune report says
item.description: Beyond immediate losses, attacks often lead to prolonged downtime, liquidity shocks and confidence erosion, as interconnected DeFi systems amplify the impact across markets.

item.title: Apex Group’s Tokeny taps Polygon to debut chain for compliant tokenized RWAs
item.description: Apex Group’s Tokeny and Polygon Labs are launching T-REX Ledger, a Polygon-based blockchain that aims to centralize compliance for ERC-3643 security tokens.

item.title: Crypto.com Slashes Workforce by 12% in 'Enterprise-Wide AI' Pivot
item.description: Cryptocurrency exchange Crypto.com is laying off around 180 employees as it shifts focus to AI-driven operations.

item.title: Browser maker Opera seeks 160 million CELO stake to become key network stakeholder
item.description: The proposed allocation represents a major share of Celo's circulating supply and 16% of its maximum supply.

item.title: From Strategy to Scale: Implementing Stablecoin Programs and Measuring What Matters
item.description: For many banks, the conversation around stablecoins has moved beyond theory. Leadership teams have already explored the strategic question of… The post From Strategy to Scale: Implementing Stablecoin Programs and Measuring What Matters app…

item.title: XRP treasury firm Evernorth discloses $233.7 million impairment on holdings in SPAC filing
item.description: The company reported a $233.7 million digital asset impairment for 2025, reflecting the gap between purchase prices and lower market values.

item.title: Crypto.com cuts 12% of staff as it accelerates AI push
item.description: Crypto.com CEO Kris Marszalek announced a 12% workforce reduction due to AI integrations, warning that companies “that do not make this pivot immediately will fail.”

item.title: Bitcoin tests old 2021 top as gold falls to six-week lows under $4.7K
item.description: Bitcoin price correction reversed at $69,500, preserving a new higher BTC trading range as gold led a post-Fed macro asset sell-off.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin falls -$5,000 in 24 hours and drops below $70,000 as the broader selloff accelerates due to surging energy prices. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBlSGdmamdTbUtNN3dvR3BoamtJVEJWS2k4WmRLV2ZFS0twOEFHYXhzSFIxV0VacjliSERtVjBudkZnbl84OHhXLUxnMmRLUnN3ekx6M0l4OW03VzBfd1ZKVExvV04tZw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin falls -$5,…

item.title: The era of listings and on-ramps is ending, as intent protocols make access native
item.description: Listings and on-ramps monetized access scarcity. Intent-based protocols make it native to networks, ending gatekeeper detours forever.

item.title: Morning Minute: Markets Tumble as Iran War Escalates
item.description: Bitcoin, gold and stocks all tumbled after several strikes on energy infrastructure. Hyperliquid just brought the S&P 500 onchain. And Kraken has put its IPO on ice.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF inflow streak snaps with $164M outflows amid BTC dip
item.description: US Bitcoin and altcoin ETFs saw notable outflows on Wednesday as BTC dipped below $71,000 and investor sentiment returned to extreme fear.

item.title: Ethereum long squeeze risk rises as ETH price dips to $2,100
item.description: Ether risks over $2.5 billion in long liquidations below $2K, with volatility increasing the chance of a retest of $1,800 support.

item.title: Bitcoin Dips Under $70K as Stocks Tumble on Hawkish Fed Hold—What’s Next?
item.description: Analysts remain cautiously optimistic after the Fed’s hawkish stance, expecting a low volatility regime ahead of the quarterly options expiry.

item.title: Bitcoin whales shift $100M+ as oil spike rattles markets
item.description: Ancient Bitcoin holders moved millions to exchanges as Middle East tensions drove oil higher, fueling a broader risk-off shift across crypto and traditional markets.

item.title: Can Bitcoin Really Do DeFi? A New Protocol Aims to Find Out
item.description: OP_NET is a new protocol that aims to bring smart contracts and decentralized finance directly to Bitcoin transactions.

item.title: South Korea opposition party pushes to scrap planned 22% crypto tax
item.description: The ruling Democratic Party responded, saying it has not formed a consensus on abolishing the tax but will review the new proposal.

item.title: Coinbase faces a multibillion-dollar threat from D.C. but a 'rewards' loophole could protect its stablecoin revenue
item.description: The proposed rules could ban yield on stablecoins like USDC, though analysts say the exchange may adapt.

item.title: Bitcoin’s biggest DeFi drawback under attack as OpNet unlocks smart contracts on mainnet
item.description: Bitcoin’s biggest limitation is being challenged as OpNet brings native, yield-generating DeFi directly to the Bitcoin mainnet.

item.title: LA Rideshare Driver Charged With Using $2M in COVID Relief Funds to Buy Crypto
item.description: Authorities seized almost 40 BTC as part of the investigation, in which a rideshare driver is accused of wire fraud and money laundering.

item.title: Crypto.com cuts 12% of staff as it integrates AI across the business for efficiency
item.description: The exchange laid off about 180 employees as it restructures and rolls out enterprise-wide AI to drive efficiencies.

item.title: Quantum-Ready Bitcoin Prototype Debuts, but Adoption Hurdles Loom
item.description: Adopting the model would require miners and users to migrate to a separate “Bitcoin Quantum” blockchain rather than upgrade the existing network.

item.title: Capital is shifting into digital dollars as bitcoin wilts
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 19, 2026

item.title: Venus’ XVS token plunges 9% as exploit leaves protocol with bad debt
item.description: The exploit, which occurred on March 16, didn’t appear to impact XVS prices until analysis showed major holders moving large amounts to exchanges.

item.title: Bitcoin slips below $70,000 as oil surge, Fed pause weigh on risk assets
item.description: BTC dipped below $70,000 as energy prices spiked and the Fed held interest rates, pressuring crypto and equities.

item.title: Bitcoin’s quantum threat is real, but far from an existential crisis, Galaxy says
item.description: Developers are already working to address quantum risks, and investors shouldn’t mistake a long-term challenge for an immediate threat, according to Galaxy Digital’s head of research Alex Thorn.

item.title: Bitcoin, unusually, outperforms gold as hawkish Fed, oil price fuel risk-off sentiment
item.description: Bitcoin fell 2% while gold and silver saw sharper declines as oil prices surged and the Fed flashed hawkish signals.

item.title: Global Fraud Summit 2026: From Fragmented Efforts to a Global Fraud Response
item.description: Fraud no longer sits at the margins of economic crime. It crosses borders, exploits gaps between jurisdictions, and scales at… The post Global Fraud Summit 2026: From Fragmented Efforts to a Global Fraud Response appeared first on Chainaly…

item.title: Why Ethereum developers want ‘one-click staking’ for institutions
item.description: Ethereum developers are pushing one-click staking to simplify validator operations, attract institutions and strengthen decentralization across the network.

item.title: ECB opens digital euro work on ATMs and payment terminals
item.description: The initiative targets how a digital euro would operate across existing payment rails, with emphasis on offline transactions and interoperability.

item.title: OpenClaw devs targeted by phishing scam promising free ‘CLAW’ tokens
item.description: A phishing campaign used fake GitHub posts and a bogus “CLAW” token to lure OpenClaw developers into connecting crypto wallets.

item.title: The abundance that AI may promise is not free
item.description: AI abundance promises free everything through massive centralized infrastructure. Whoever controls the energy and AI factories dictates distribution terms and user autonomy.

item.title: Bitcoin OGs dump over $100 million in BTC after hawkish Fed dents rate cut hopes
item.description: OGs sell as Fed's hawkish stance on rates pressures crypto and other risk assets.

item.title: Forget market hours: Leading ETP firm just opened 24/7 liquidity for tokenized stocks, gold and money market funds
item.description: ETP market giant Flow Traders just launched 24/7 over-the-counter (OTC) liquidity service for tokenized assets.

item.title: Canada revokes 47 crypto money licenses, vows to continue
item.description: Near the end of last year, FINTRAC fined crypto platform Cryptomus $126 million and crypto exchange KuCoin $14 million for a range of alleged violations.

item.title: Nasdaq Wins SEC Approval to Trade Tokenized Securities in Pilot Program
item.description: The approval lets Nasdaq test tokenized versions of some stocks and ETFs without moving beyond existing market rails.

item.title: 🔥 NOW: Ethereum leads the L1 market by ecosystem TVL, followed by Tron, Solana, and BNB Chain, per Token Terminal. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9KczRQR1FtaGVaXzdUSUVTS3R0R01jdDY2cmdXdm9ZcUZzSmJrTC1zbjNjU3kxZnFwODFyZmt4QmdOMEZScE1NbHhMRzVEQ0RzaFBzMEUydmNSYmdNODFsX0p6ZFQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 NOW: Ethereum leads the L1 m…

item.title: OpenClaw Developers Lured in GitHub Phishing Campaign Targeting Crypto Wallets
item.description: The phishing campaign lures OpenClaw developers with fake $5,000 token airdrops, then drains wallets through a cloned site with a hidden connection prompt.

item.title: Why Bitcoin Is Falling Despite $1.1 Billion in ETF Inflows
item.description: Persistent inflation signals and surging oil prices are weighing on risk appetite, even as institutional money has continued to flow.

item.title: 🔥 LATEST: A Bitcoin OG who bought 5,000 $BTC for just $1.66M twelve years ago has sold another 1,000 $BTC ($71.57M), bringing total profits to $442M, a 266x return. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFAzQlJOMFVwWGhPUS1sSzdwbW5fS2ppTlJ6V1dOaFdBZUJ6eGpLVExWTEI1emU0RkdXQnJlV1MzUml4cmVVT000Tl80THZLNXdTbnRzWEt4RUZfTlZEUDR2TVFKTlc?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 LATEST: A Bitcoin OG who bou…

item.title: Bitcoin OG Owen Gunden, who previously sold 11K $BTC($1.12B), sold another 650 $BTC($46.3M) 10 hours ago. intel.arkm.com/explorer/addre… x.com/lookonchain/st… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE41emxLQmpLWU9tQldTeVZkUlpoVTNIZFVZRmNhNHFyd0N0c290Z2VMUTdobFZnTF9HN00wTXZNTE1WYjJONXA5QVB6ZkY4dXpJcm9GQnlqSkEtb2hZaGY4SVpR?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin OG Owen Gunden, who previo…

item.title: Coalition Urges OpenAI to Scrap AI Ballot Measure Over Child Safety Concerns
item.description: Advocacy groups say the OpenAI-backed measure would limit legal accountability and lock in narrow protections for children.

item.title: Algorand Foundation Cuts 25% of Staff as Crypto Industry Layoffs Grow
item.description: The organization behind layer-1 blockchain Algorand laid off 25% of its staff due to macroeconomic uncertainty and lower crypto prices.

item.title: SEC approves Nasdaq's move to support tokenized securities trading
item.description: The SEC’s approval lets Nasdaq test blockchain-based versions of stocks that trade and settle like traditional shares.

item.title: Trump White House Registers Aliens.gov—Is the UFO File Drop Imminent?
item.description: The White House registered aliens.gov, a month after Trump ordered the release of all government UAP and UFO files following a viral Obama moment.

item.title: Fairshake's $10 million Illinois misfire marks first big hitch in crypto political surge
item.description: The crypto sector's leading political action committee devoted more than 5% of its war chest trying to defeat a Senate candidate who just won her primary.

item.title: From Coinbase to Ripple: The Biggest Crypto Cases Dumped by Trump's SEC
item.description: Under President Trump, the SEC has backed down from nearly all its fights with crypto firms. These are the biggest cases ended so far.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 SEC approves Nasdaq rule change to enable tokenized securities trading 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE11alN6STFhQl9QMkhsckNaa1M2REdVTTRWVzRVNVVGbEJlLUVlY1doMl9KaXVLc0RkRkhSTEJQc29obEJUR2RvVEJRWElud0pYaWI2YVc0bG5wYktpb0xqRV9IbjFjOTA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 SEC approves …
